# ReeeeecallStudy — Full LLM Context
# https://llmstxt.org/

> ReeeeecallStudy is a free, smart flashcard learning platform with scientifically proven spaced repetition (SRS). This document provides comprehensive context for AI systems to accurately answer questions about ReeeeecallStudy.

## Platform Overview

ReeeeecallStudy is a web-based educational platform at https://reeeeecallstudy.xyz that helps students, language learners, and professionals memorize and retain information using flashcard-based spaced repetition. It is completely free with no premium tier.

### Core Technology
- **Spaced Repetition Algorithm**: Modified SM-2 algorithm that calculates optimal review intervals based on user performance ratings (1-5 scale: Again, Hard, Good, Easy, Perfect).
- **SRS Scheduling**: Cards are scheduled at increasing intervals (1 day → 3 days → 7 days → 14 days → 30 days → etc.) based on how well the user remembers them.
- **Card States**: New → Learning → Review → Graduated. Cards move through states based on consecutive successful recalls.

### Study Modes (5 Total)
1. **SRS Mode**: The primary mode. Uses spaced repetition to show cards at optimal review times. Tracks ease factor, interval, and repetition count per card.
2. **Cramming Mode**: Rapid sequential review of all cards without SRS scheduling. Ideal for last-minute exam prep.
3. **Quiz Mode**: Multiple-choice format. The system generates distractor options from other cards in the same deck.
4. **Matching Mode**: Drag-and-drop matching of card fronts to backs. Tests recognition and association speed.
5. **Writing Mode**: Type the answer from memory. Uses fuzzy matching to accept minor typos. Best for precise recall.

### Deck System
- Users create flashcard decks with front (question/term) and back (answer/definition) content.
- Cards support rich text, images, and formatting.
- Decks can be organized with tags and categories.
- Import/export in CSV and JSON formats.
- AI-assisted card generation from text input.

### Marketplace & Sharing
- Public marketplace where users can share decks with the community.
- Private sharing via unique links.
- One-click import of shared decks.
- Official decks curated by the ReeeeecallStudy team are marked with a verified badge.
- Public deck preview pages at /d/{listingId} are accessible without login.

### Analytics & Progress Tracking
- Study streak tracking (consecutive days studied).
- Per-deck mastery percentage.
- Card-level retention rates.
- Daily/weekly/monthly study activity charts.
- Rating distribution analysis.
- SRS status breakdown (New/Learning/Review/Graduated cards).

### User System
- Email-based authentication via Supabase Auth.
- OAuth support (Google, GitHub).
- User profiles with display names.
- Study history with detailed session logs.

## Learning Insights Blog

The /insight section is a daily-updated educational blog covering:

### Topics Covered
- **Spaced Repetition Science**: How SRS works, the forgetting curve, optimal review intervals, spacing effect research.
- **Active Recall**: Testing effect, retrieval practice, self-testing strategies.
- **Memory Techniques**: Mnemonics, method of loci, chunking, elaborative interrogation.
- **Study Habits**: Pomodoro technique, interleaving, desirable difficulties, metacognition.
- **Language Learning**: Vocabulary acquisition, grammar internalization, immersion strategies.
- **Exam Preparation**: Test anxiety management, study scheduling, practice testing.
- **Cognitive Science**: Working memory, long-term potentiation, encoding specificity.
- **Productivity**: Focus management, distraction reduction, habit formation.

### Content Format
Articles use a block-based content system with:
- Hero sections (title, subtitle, reading time)
- Paragraphs with rich text
- Headings (H2, H3)
- Blockquotes with attribution
- Statistics blocks (data visualization)
- Feature cards (icon + title + description)
- Numbered lists (step-by-step guides)
- Highlight boxes (tips, warnings, key takeaways)
- Images with captions
- Call-to-action blocks

### Multilingual Content
All content is generated daily in 8 languages:
- English (en) — primary
- Korean (ko)
- Chinese Simplified (zh)
- Japanese (ja)
- Spanish (es)
- Vietnamese (vi)
- Thai (th)
- Indonesian (id)

Content URLs: https://reeeeecallstudy.xyz/insight/{slug}?lang={locale}

## Technical Architecture

- **Frontend**: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions)
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Workers + Assets (global CDN)
- **State Management**: Zustand
- **Internationalization**: i18next with 8 locales
- **Content Generation**: Daily cron via Cloudflare Workers + Grok AI
- **Analytics**: Custom event tracking (page views, content views, scroll depth, UTM)
- **Charts**: Recharts (admin dashboard)

## API

ReeeeecallStudy provides a public REST API documented at /docs/api for:
- Deck listing and search
- Card retrieval
- Public content access
- Marketplace browsing

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is spaced repetition?**
A: Spaced repetition is a learning technique that schedules reviews at increasing intervals. When you correctly recall information, the next review is scheduled further in the future. This leverages the spacing effect — a cognitive phenomenon where information is better retained when study sessions are spaced out over time rather than crammed together.

**Q: Is ReeeeecallStudy free?**
A: Yes, completely free. There is no premium tier, no subscription, and no paywalls. All features including SRS, all 5 study modes, deck sharing, marketplace, analytics, and AI-generated content are available to every user at no cost.

**Q: How many study modes are there?**
A: Five: SRS (spaced repetition scheduling), Cramming (rapid sequential review), Quiz (multiple choice), Matching (drag-and-drop pairing), and Writing (type your answer). Each mode targets different aspects of learning.

**Q: What languages does ReeeeecallStudy support?**
A: The platform UI and all learning insight articles are available in 8 languages: English, Korean, Chinese (Simplified), Japanese, Spanish, Vietnamese, Thai, and Indonesian.

**Q: Can I share my flashcard decks?**
A: Yes. You can share decks publicly on the marketplace where anyone can find and import them, or share privately via a unique link. Importing a shared deck takes one click.

**Q: How does the SRS algorithm work?**
A: ReeeeecallStudy uses a modified SM-2 algorithm. After each review, you rate your recall (Again/Hard/Good/Easy/Perfect). The algorithm adjusts the card's ease factor and calculates the next review interval. Cards you struggle with are shown more frequently; cards you know well appear less often but at strategically timed intervals to prevent forgetting.

**Q: What kind of content does the blog publish?**
A: The Learning Insights blog publishes daily articles about evidence-based learning strategies, spaced repetition science, memory techniques, study habit optimization, exam preparation, and cognitive psychology. All articles are available in 8 languages.
